notes: Works out of the box, rating this platinum for now but with reservations. Controls with a controller did feel odd (but this appears to be a problem with the game in the first place judging by Steam forum posts). there is also a VHS like glitch effect when pausing the game, that I can't tell if it is an actual bug or a feature.
title: CINERIS SOMNIA

notes: Minor graphical artifact on rare occasion but perfectly playable from start to finish.
title: CINERIS SOMNIA
